data.acceptance:
- `beat-table-metadata.tsx` reads agent fields using one canonical key per artifact type (note → `agentname`, step → `agent_name`, etc.).
- The `["agentname", "agentName", "agent_name"]` style fallback chains are gone.
- If a record is missing the canonical field, the renderer either shows nothing or fails loudly (no inventing).
- `grep -n "\"agentName\"\|\"agentname\"\|\"agent_name\"" src/components/beat-table-metadata.tsx` shows at most one constant string per artifact type.
